eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using the old import causes a compile error (unresolved reference) on JDK 21 with the new Spring Boot version.

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing a compile-time 'unresolved reference' error.

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security configuration from deprecated imperative API to the new lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.why_exists: The methods `authorizeRequests()`, `antMatchers()`, and the chained `csrf().disable()` syntax are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Update CSRF and header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL in Spring Security 6.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.why_exists: The chained method calls `csrf().disable().headers().frameOptions().disable()` are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the JDK and replaced by jakarta.persistence in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'unresolved reference: javax' if not updated.
